LicenseAssignment.ReadWrite.All (Applica.name: LicenseAssignment.ReadWrite.All
LicenseAssignment.ReadWrite.All (Applica.description: Allows an app to manage license assignments for users and groups, without a signed-in user.

Group.ManageProtection.All (DelegatedWor.name: Group.ManageProtection.All
Group.ManageProtection.All (DelegatedWor.displayName: Manage the Microsoft Information Protection (MIP) label for M365 and security groups.
Group.ManageProtection.All (DelegatedWor.description: Allows the app to list groups, and to read their basic properties and manage the MIP label for all label enabled groups on behalf of the signed-in user.

POP.AccessAsUser.All (DelegatedPersonal).name: POP.AccessAsUser.All
POP.AccessAsUser.All (DelegatedPersonal).displayName: Read and write access to mailboxes via POP.
POP.AccessAsUser.All (DelegatedPersonal).description: Allows the app to have the same access to mailboxes as the signed-in user via POP protocol.

MailboxItem.ImportExport (DelegatedWork).name: MailboxItem.ImportExport
MailboxItem.ImportExport (DelegatedWork).displayName: Export and import a user's mailbox items
MailboxItem.ImportExport (DelegatedWork).description: Allows the app to export and import the user's mailbox items, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.Read.All (De.name: UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.Read.All
UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.Read.All (De.displayName: Read all users' Windows Hello methods
UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.Read.All (De.description: Allows the app to read Windows Hello authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

EduReports-Reflect.ReadAnonymous.All (Ap.name: EduReports-Reflect.ReadAnonymous.All
EduReports-Reflect.ReadAnonymous.All (Ap.displayName: Read all tenant reflect check-ins submissions data
EduReports-Reflect.ReadAnonymous.All (Ap.description: Allows the app to read all tenant users reflect check-ins submissions data (excludes responder-identifying information) without a signed-in user.

ReportSettings.Read.All (Application).name: ReportSettings.Read.All
ReportSettings.Read.All (Application).description: Allows the app to read all admin report settings, such as whether to display concealed information in reports, without a signed-in user.

EduAssignments.Read (DelegatedWork).name: EduAssignments.Read
EduAssignments.Read (DelegatedWork).displayName: Read users' class assignments and their grades
EduAssignments.Read (DelegatedWork).description: Allows the app to read assignments and their grades on behalf of the user.

LifecycleWorkflows.Read.All (Application.name: LifecycleWorkflows.Read.All
LifecycleWorkflows.Read.All (Application.description: Allows the app to list and read all workflows, tasks and related lifecycle workflows resources without a signed-in user.

GroupSettings.Read.All (DelegatedWork).name: GroupSettings.Read.All
GroupSettings.Read.All (DelegatedWork).displayName: Read all group settings that user can access
GroupSettings.Read.All (DelegatedWork).description: Allows the app to read a list of tenant-level or group-specific group settings objects, on behalf of the signed-in user.

AppCertTrustConfiguration.ReadWrite.All.name: AppCertTrustConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
AppCertTrustConfiguration.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete the trusted certificate authority configuration which can be used to restrict application certificates based on their issuing authority, on behalf of the signed-in user.

RoleManagement.Read.Exchange (DelegatedW.name: RoleManagement.Read.Exchange
RoleManagement.Read.Exchange (DelegatedW.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your organization's Exchange Online service, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading Exchange management role definitions, role groups, role group membership, role assignments, management scopes, and role assignment policies.

Mail.Send (DelegatedPersonal).name: Mail.Send
Mail.Send (DelegatedPersonal).description: Allows the app to send mail as users in the organization.

ThreatAssessment.Read.All (Application).name: ThreatAssessment.Read.All
ThreatAssessment.Read.All (Application).description: Allows an app to read your organization's threat assessment requests, without a signed-in user.

IMAP.AccessAsUser.All (DelegatedWork).name: IMAP.AccessAsUser.All
IMAP.AccessAsUser.All (DelegatedWork).displayName: Read and write access to mailboxes via IMAP.
IMAP.AccessAsUser.All (DelegatedWork).description: Allows the app to have the same access to mailboxes as the signed-in user via IMAP protocol.

LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.Al.name: LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.All
LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.Al.displayName: Read and write all self-initiated courses
LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.Al.description: Allows the app to create, update, read and delete all self-initiated courses in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

SecurityCopilotWorkspaces.Read.All (Dele.name: SecurityCopilotWorkspaces.Read.All
SecurityCopilotWorkspaces.Read.All (Dele.displayName: Read all Security Copilot resources for the signed-in user
SecurityCopilotWorkspaces.Read.All (Dele.description: Allows the app to read all Security Copilot signed-in user's resources on behalf of the signed-in user

SecurityIdentitiesAccount.Read.All (Appl.name: SecurityIdentitiesAccount.Read.All
SecurityIdentitiesAccount.Read.All (Appl.displayName: Read all identity security available identity accounts
SecurityIdentitiesAccount.Read.All (Appl.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security available identity accounts without a signed-in user.

Device.Read.All (DelegatedWork).name: Device.Read.All
Device.Read.All (DelegatedWork).description: Allows the app to read your organization's devices' configuration information on behalf of the signed-in user.

CustomSecAttributeAssignment.ReadWrite.A.name: CustomSecAttributeAssignment.ReadWrite.All
CustomSecAttributeAssignment.ReadWrite.A.displayName: Read and write custom security attribute assignments
CustomSecAttributeAssignment.ReadWrite.A.description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute assignments for all principals in the tenant without a signed in user.

TeamsTab.Read.All (Application).name: TeamsTab.Read.All
TeamsTab.Read.All (Application).description: Read the names and settings of tabs inside any team in Microsoft Teams, without a signed-in user. This does not give access to the content inside the tabs.

Policy.ReadWrite.HybridAuthentication (D.name: Policy.ReadWrite.HybridAuthentication
Policy.ReadWrite.HybridAuthentication (D.displayName: Read and write your organization's hybrid authentication policies
Policy.ReadWrite.HybridAuthentication (D.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's hybrid authentication policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

RoleAssignmentSchedule.Read.Directory (D.name: RoleAssignmentSchedule.Read.Directory
RoleAssignmentSchedule.Read.Directory (D.displayName: Read all active role assignments for your company's directory
RoleAssignmentSchedule.Read.Directory (D.description: Allows the app to read the active role-based access control (RBAC) assignments for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading directory role templates, and directory roles.
